title: Rigid stablecoin reserve rules can increase default risk, BIS paper finds
message_html: Rigid stablecoin reserve rules can increase default risk, BIS paper finds ...
snippet: Regulators in the EU, US and elsewhere are moving toward combinations of liquidity and capital thresholds for stablecoin issuers, but the calibration varies widely. title: DNB Bank expands partnership with Infosys for AI-driven financial crime operations
message_html: DNB Bank expands partnership with Infosys for AI-driven financial crime operations ...
